Handles byte data retrieval protocols, storage management, and core dump/file/flash storage operations.


## Files
- **[get_bytes.c](get_bytes.c.md)**: Handles the protocol for retrieving byte data, including setup, error response, and data transmission.
- **[get_bytes.h](get_bytes.h.md)**: Defines enums for object types and error codes used in the GetBytes transfer process.
- **[get_bytes_private.h](get_bytes_private.h.md)**: Defines structures and enumerations for handling core dump and file transfers over a communication session protocol.
- **[get_bytes_storage.c](get_bytes_storage.c.md)**: Implements storage management for different types, including coredump, file, and flash storage.
- **[get_bytes_storage.h](get_bytes_storage.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for managing different types of byte storage in firmware.
- **[get_bytes_storage_coredump.c](get_bytes_storage_coredump.c.md)**: Functions for managing core dump storage in flash memory, including setup, size retrieval, reading, and cleanup.
- **[get_bytes_storage_coredump.h](get_bytes_storage_coredump.h.md)**: Functions for setting up, reading, and cleaning up coredump storage in the Pebble firmware.
- **[get_bytes_storage_file.c](get_bytes_storage_file.c.md)**: Functions for setting up, reading, and cleaning up byte storage files using a filesystem interface.
- **[get_bytes_storage_file.h](get_bytes_storage_file.h.md)**: Functions for setting up, reading, and cleaning up byte storage files in firmware.
- **[get_bytes_storage_flash.c](get_bytes_storage_flash.c.md)**: Functions for setting up, reading, and cleaning up byte storage in flash memory.
- **[get_bytes_storage_flash.h](get_bytes_storage_flash.h.md)**: Functions for setting up, getting size, reading, and cleaning up byte storage in flash memory.
